result:
Patch is at `runtime/drafts/fix-i1-blank-title.patch`. The approval artifact is at `runtime/queue/approvals/fix-i1-blank-title-commit-push.md`. Two things I can't do:

**`git commit`/`git push`**: Consequential per project conventions. The approval artifact is queued; a human runs those commands after Priya Anand reviews (she owns `parse.ts`).

**Delete `legacy_cache.ts`**: It's not dead code. `pipeline.ts:11` imports and actively calls `isUnchanged` and `remember` from it. The file header also says explicitly "NOT yet removable." To remove it you'd first need to rip out those call-sites in `pipeline.ts`, then get Tess Whitlock's security sign-off.
